Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 693}Are you here to pick up chicks?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 693}You're doing it wrong! You have to be more subtle or it'll put them off![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 693}I'm here today with the intention of getting a girlfriend, too! That makes us rivals, doesn't it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 693}Those girls were kinda harsh... You shouldn't argue with them when they're like that.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 693}Just agree with what they say and shower them with compliments! This is a very basic technique.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 693}Looks like she already has a boyfriend... Tough luck.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 693}"It's lame to hit on girls at the beach," they said...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 693}How could you make such a cutie cry!? Hurry up and go after her![n]{f 1 1}
